justification: Based on the provided privacy notice, Gemini explicitly states that it will only access location data if activities speiching is enabled and the user has granted permission for app-level or browser-level location access. Since the user has not granted explicit location permission, Gemini should not attempt to collect precise device location.

source_excerpts.quote: Diese Daten werden nicht von Google Ende-zu-Ende-verschlüsselt.

quote_verification.model_quote: Diese Daten werden nicht von Google Ende-zu-Ende-verschlüsselt.
quote_verification.policy_quote: Welche Daten werden erhoben und verarbeitet?
